# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for cross-account CI/CD access with secure trust policy

Parameters:
  TrustedAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: List of trusted AWS account IDs that can assume this role
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Each account ID must be a 12-digit number

  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID to restrict access
    AllowedPattern: '^o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-abc1234567)

  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for additional security when assuming the role
    NoEcho: true
    MinLength: 16
    MaxLength: 256
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9+=,.@:\/-]+$'
    ConstraintDescription: External ID must be between 16-256 characters

  RoleSessionDurationSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Description: Maximum session duration in seconds
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 900
    MaxValue: 3600

  Environment:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - production
    Description: Deployment environment

Conditions:
  IsProduction: !Equals [!Ref Environment, 'production']

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'cicd-cross-account-role-${Environment}'
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref RoleSessionDurationSeconds
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCrossAccountAssumption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ','
                - !Sub
                  - '${Accounts}'
                  - Accounts: !Join
                      - ','
                      - !Split
                        - ','
                        - !Join
                          - ','
                          - !Ref TrustedAccountIds
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'true'
              StringLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn: !Split
                  - ','
                  - !Sub
                    - '${ArnPatterns}'
                    - ArnPatterns: !Join
                        - ','
                        - - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/cicd-pipeline-role-${Environment}'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub 'cicd-deployment-policy-${Environment}'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AllowS3ArtifactAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::cicd-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}-${Environment}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::cicd-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}-${Environment}/*'
              - Sid: AllowCloudFormationDeploy
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents'
                  - 'cloudformation:GetTemplate'
                  - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
                  - 'cloudformation:ListStackResources'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/cicd-${Environment}-*/*'
              - Sid: AllowECRAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
                  - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
                  - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
                  - 'ecr:PutImage'
                  - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
                  - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/cicd-${Environment}-*'
              - Sid: AllowECRAuth
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: AllowCloudWatchLogs
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/cicd/${Environment}/*'
              - Sid: DenyInsecureActions
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateUser'
                  - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:CreateLoginProfile'
                  - 'iam:UpdateLoginProfile'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRole'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRolePolicy'
                  - 'organizations:*'
                  - 'account:*'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICD-CrossAccount

  RoleActivityAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Condition: IsProduction
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub 'cicd-role-unusual-activity-${Environment}'
      AlarmDescription: Alert on unusual assume role activity for CI/CD cross-account role
      Namespace: AWS/CloudTrail
      MetricName: AssumeRoleEvents
      Dimensions:
        - Name: RoleName
          Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 50
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CI/CD cross-account role
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'

  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the CI/CD cross-account role
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
